calculators.title: Estonian Salary Calculator 2026
calculators.description: Calculate net salary from gross, including all taxes and contributions. Updated with current rates.

calculators.title: Dividend Tax Calculator Estonia
calculators.description: Calculate tax on distributed profits for Estonian companies. Regular vs regular rate.
calculators.note: Effective rate is 22/78 of the net dividend (20%)

calculators.title: VAT Calculator Estonia (24%)
calculators.description: Add or remove VAT from amounts. Calculate VAT inclusive and exclusive prices.

calculators.title: Income Tax Calculator Estonia
calculators.description: Calculate income tax on various types of income (employment, business, dividends, etc.)

calculators.title: Freelancer Income Calculator
calculators.description: Calculate after-tax income for freelancers, including social tax obligations.
calculators.note: Includes income tax (22%) and social contributions
